latin: Adulescens astutus, qui a schola se absentaverat, spectatoribus dixit: 'vita celeriter procedit. nisi interdum consistis et circumspicias, eam praetermittas.'

questions.prompt: What has the clever teenager done?

questions.target: Life moves fast — stop and look around or you'll miss it
choices: Life moves fast — stop and look around or you'll miss it

translation: A clever teenager, who had been absent from school, said to the audience: 'Life moves quickly. Unless you stop sometimes and look around, you might miss it.'
